label: 1502 CE
era_summary: Year 1502 (MDII) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1502: Turkey-Venice, 1498-1503; France, Spain-Milan, Naples, 1500-02; Spain-France (Naples), 1502-04. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
